# `EvalSuite` manifest

Reference for `kind: EvalSuite` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`EvalSuite.schema.json`](../schemas/EvalSuite.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: EvalSuite
metadata:
  id: example-suite
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example eval suite.
spec:
  agentId: example-agent
  cases:
  - id: greets
    input: Say hello.
    assertions:
    - kind: contains
      params:
        value: hello
  replayMode: Live
```
